# Nuvora — Smart Tools, Simply Done
> Free online tools for everyone — DNS lookup, PDF conversion, image editing, security checks, and developer utilities. No signup, no tracking, 100% browser-based.

## Tools
- /dns-lookup: DNS Lookup tool — query A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, NS, TXT, SOA records
- /ssl-certificate-checker: SSL Certificate Checker — validate and inspect SSL/TLS certificates
- /whois-lookup: WHOIS Lookup — domain registration data and RDAP
- /ip-lookup: IP Lookup — geolocation, ISP, ASN information
- /what-is-my-ip: What Is My IP — public IP address, browser info, WebRTC leak test
- /reverse-dns-lookup: Reverse DNS Lookup — PTR records
- /dns-propagation-checker: DNS Propagation Checker — global DNS propagation
- /http-headers-checker: HTTP Headers Checker — security headers, cache headers
- /ping-test: Ping Test — network latency, packet loss, jitter
- /port-checker: Port Checker — TCP port availability
- /website-status-checker: Website Status Checker — uptime, response time
- /user-agent-parser: User Agent Parser — browser, OS, device detection
- /subnet-calculator: Subnet Calculator — CIDR, netmask, IP range
- /password-generator: Password Generator — strong passwords, passphrases
- /password-strength-checker: Password Strength Checker — entropy, crack time
- /data-breach-checker: Data Breach Checker — email breach history
- /json-formatter: JSON Formatter — format, validate, minify JSON
- /base64-encoder: Base64 Encoder — encode/decode Base64
- /url-encoder: URL Encoder — URL encode/decode
- /html-entity-encoder: HTML Entity Encoder — encode special characters
- /jwt-decoder: JWT Decoder — decode and inspect JWT tokens
- /uuid-generator: UUID Generator — v4, v7 UUIDs
- /regex-tester: Regex Tester — test regular expressions live
- /md5-hash-generator: MD5 Hash Generator — MD5 hashing
- /sha-hash-generator: SHA Hash Generator — SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512
- /html-minifier: HTML Minifier — compress HTML
- /css-minifier: CSS Minifier — compress CSS
- /js-minifier: JS Minifier — compress JavaScript
- /case-converter: Case Converter — uppercase, lowercase, title case, camelCase
- /number-base-converter: Number Base Converter — binary, octal, decimal, hex
- /color-converter: Color Converter — hex, RGB, HSL, CMYK
- /markdown-preview: Markdown Preview — live Markdown rendering
- /sql-formatter: SQL Formatter — format SQL queries
- /text-to-slug: Text to Slug — SEO-friendly URL slugs
- /url-parser: URL Parser — parse and analyze URLs
- /json-to-csv: JSON to CSV — convert between formats
- /yaml-to-json: YAML to JSON — format conversion
- /xml-to-json: XML to JSON — format conversion
- /timestamp-converter: Timestamp Converter — Unix timestamp to date
- /image-compressor: Image Compressor — compress JPEG, PNG, WebP
- /image-converter: Image Converter — convert between formats
- /crop-image: Crop Image — crop images online
- /background-remover: Background Remover — remove image backgrounds
- /watermark-image: Watermark Image — add text/image watermarks
- /merge-pdf: Merge PDF — combine PDF files
- /split-pdf: Split PDF — extract pages from PDF
- /compress-pdf: Compress PDF — reduce PDF file size
- /protect-pdf: Protect PDF — add password protection
- /unlock-pdf: Unlock PDF — remove password protection
- /pdf-to-word: PDF to Word — convert PDF to DOCX
- /pdf-to-jpg: PDF to JPG — convert PDF pages to images
- /word-to-pdf: Word to PDF — convert DOCX to PDF
- /qr-code-generator: QR Code Generator — create QR codes
- /barcode-generator: Barcode Generator — create barcodes
- /robots-txt-generator: Robots.txt Generator — create robots.txt
- /sitemap-generator: Sitemap Generator — generate XML sitemaps
- /meta-tag-generator: Meta Tag Generator — SEO meta tags
- /open-graph-generator: Open Graph Generator — social preview tags
- /schema-generator: Schema Generator — JSON-LD structured data
- /redirect-checker: Redirect Checker — trace HTTP redirects
- /broken-link-checker: Broken Link Checker — find broken links
- /serp-preview: SERP Preview — Google search result preview
- /keyword-density: Keyword Density Checker — analyze keyword usage
- /seo-audit: SEO Audit — comprehensive SEO analysis
- /page-speed-checker: Page Speed Checker — website performance
- /backlink-checker: Backlink Checker — analyze backlinks
- /bmi-calculator: BMI Calculator — body mass index
- /calorie-calculator: Calorie Calculator — daily calorie needs
- /age-calculator: Age Calculator — exact age calculation
- /date-calculator: Date Calculator — date arithmetic
- /unit-converter: Unit Converter — convert between units
- /scientific-calculator: Scientific Calculator — advanced math
- /percentage-calculator: Percentage Calculator — percentage math
- /mortgage-calculator: Mortgage Calculator — monthly payments
- /loan-calculator: Loan Calculator — amortization schedule
- /compound-interest-calculator: Compound Interest Calculator — investment growth
- /currency-converter: Currency Converter — live exchange rates
- /crypto-converter: Crypto Converter — cryptocurrency conversion
- /password-strength-checker: Password Strength Checker — entropy analysis
- /ssl-test: SSL Test — TLS configuration analysis
- /cors-checker: CORS Checker — test CORS headers
- /content-security-policy: CSP Checker — analyze security policies
- /xss-scanner: XSS Scanner — detect XSS vulnerabilities
- /ai-text-summarizer: AI Text Summarizer — summarize content
- /ai-rewriter: AI Rewriter — rewrite and rephrase text
- /ai-grammar-checker: AI Grammar Checker — grammar correction
- /ai-sentiment-analysis: AI Sentiment Analysis — emotion detection
- /ai-keyword-extractor: AI Keyword Extractor — extract key phrases
- /spf-lookup: SPF Lookup — email authentication check
- /dkim-lookup: DKIM Lookup — email signature verification
- /dmarc-lookup: DMARC Lookup — email policy check
- /mx-lookup: MX Lookup — mail server records
- /dnssec-checker: DNSSEC Checker — DNS security verification
- /ssl-expiry-checker: SSL Expiry Checker — certificate expiration
- /traceroute: Traceroute — network path tracing
- /speed-test: Speed Test — internet speed measurement
- /uptime-checker: Uptime Checker — website availability monitoring
